title: All Oscars 2026 Best Supporting Actress Performances, Ranked Worst To Best
text: Screen Rant's rankings of 2026 Best Supporting Actress performances from worst to best: 5. Elle Fanning in Sentimental Value - Fanning plays an American movie star cast in a Norwegian family drama, deliberately mismatched for the role, conveying she is the wrong one without seeming condescending. 4. Wunmi Mosaku in Sinners - Works within Ryan Coogler's filmmaking philosophy with real complexity while maintaining easy certainty. 3. Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas in Sentimental Value - Grounds the film with open, wonderfully warm performance. 2. Amy Madigan in Weapons - Aunt Gladys balances physical frailty with seemingly indomitable will, delivering calm cruelty that lingers. 1. Teyana Taylor in One Battle After Another - Embodies revolutionary Perfidia Beverly Hills with intoxicating charisma while revealing vulnerability beneath the bravado. The critic argues hers is the most powerful performance deserving the award based on acting merit alone. The five nominees are all excellent, representing a strong year for the category.
